name: Thelonious Monk
abstract: Thelonious Sphere Monk ( October 10, 1917 – February 17, 1982) was an American jazz pianist and composer. He had a unique improvisational style and made numerous contributions to the standard jazz repertoire, including "'Round Midnight", "Blue Monk", "Straight, No Chaser", "Ruby, My Dear", "In Walked Bud", and "Well, You Needn't".

about_quotes.speaker: Robert Glasper
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript mentions 'Thelonious Monk' only in the interviewer's question referring to 'T.S. Monk, Thelonious Monk’s son'. The interviewee (Robert Glasper) responds about T.S. Monk, stating 'That’s my cousin-in-law', but provides no information about his personal relationship with Thelonious Monk
about_quotes.doc_title: Robert Glasper interviewed by Greg Thomas, Clinton, New York, February 20, 2016

about_quotes.speaker: Orrin Keepnews
about_quotes.evidence: Monk then proceeded to sign with Riverside... it was the beginning of my career as a jazz record producer... I gained tremendously from the initially very frightening fact that this was the first artist of any significance who I worked with.
about_quotes.doc_title: Orrin Keepnews interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: Thelonious Monk I’m certain was not thought to be the next Art Tatum in his day. They probably thought he doesn’t sound like him, but he carved out his own thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: I felt very flattered to have been one of the – still feel very flattered to be one of the few people that Monk recorded with as a sideman.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Clark — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: Unfortunately, I don't know too much about Thelonius Monk, except I've read a little something about him, and I've never seen him play.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: I’d put on a recording of Monk — Thelonious Monk — and I’d tell the kids... nine times out of ten they all danced to Monk.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025
